{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322050649D2E2343081D83C69412B"}"},"total":3480},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7002161752179901215","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看完了，类似三体的小说，也是为数不多在番茄里让我感动的小说。致敬先驱、军师、各要塞的科学家、洛众生、还有百分百胜率的董辉。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1630317831,"group_id":"6954300984491248654","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxbASacIaYrk3nkrAKxQd8Ap7d1kO4BgMeqsTIXkk783","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2115115925904323","user_name":"孤星あ梦魇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2115115925904323","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6954300984491248654","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越到了未来的末世。
生态破坏，一千座要塞拔地而起，作为人类最后能生存的家园。
结果信峰开局就被人扔到了外界。
辐射，毒气，身体只是一个普通人的信峰完全没有办法在环境中生存。
还好签到选择的外挂还是在他快死的时候来了。
二选一，一个改善体质让你可以活下去的药剂。
还是一个超级厉害的充电宝。
这还用选？
结果脚下一伴。
抓向药剂的手一不小心抓歪了。
卧槽，选错了怎么办啊！？
没关系，就在这个末世中，在所有人梦想身体进化适应环境的时代，掀起一场机甲狂潮吧！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/1b4348573f239bb8e2f8aee7a18d2b03","author":"陷阵营营长","author_id":"","book_id":"6954300984491248654","book_name":"末世机甲：开局签到错选充电宝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#183048","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3715人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6954336267349787144","read_count":"3715","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"571340"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"271","tags":"科幻末世,系统,穿越,末世","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/d3628bbce0d6fa828f06d0e4cef51ed4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779311209&x-signature=EjhhFGyuJIqRqHXwjIhldG4PwI4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3395746397165147","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.1209796e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322050649D2E2343081D83C69412B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读20小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":71214,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":5549},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7124913227343610657","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我看过的所有书中让我震撼的第二本书，第一本我也不说，毕竟是在给此书做评价，一开始我是被封面所吸引，毕竟机甲是男人的浪漫，当我看了几十章后，我觉得也就这样，放弃观看，但是等我书荒了以后，我又重新开始看起了这本书，他给我的冲击很大，将人性带入机械之中，让我觉得BT还在我身边，故事一环扣一环，视角逐渐从主角身边延伸到宇宙，将外星文明展现在我的眼前，系统的离去，敌人的强大，让我不免心生绝望，但主角逆天的言词，一次次激励着我，主角从来不圣母，明智的人永远都在，将人性实实在在的体现了出来，我在看的仿佛不是一本小说，而是一部传奇的一生似的，我在作者所描绘的人物中看到了自己，能让我进行自我反思的书很少，让我思想升华的书更少，我很感谢作者，让我看到了一本史诗级的华美篇章，我会继续观看下去，期待小说的后续。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1658898254,"group_id":"6954300984491248654","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不想思考…不知所谓","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+ay0ctiAQNzKeaUHujkRj8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/08bfaa3567d24a28aa913cde9123abdb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708437&x-signature=YLdQFHiUCCxNxYzKiRkBzw5qByA%3D","user_id":"273147005502500","user_name":"小浣熊up↑"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"273147005502500","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6954300984491248654","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越到了未来的末世。

omment_id":"7362043266782020377","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本来想看本无脑系统书，没想到碰到了一本逻辑缜密的科幻小说。
美中不足就是视角单一，配角的戏份不足。
不过主角的价值观以及世界的描述，通过各个事件清晰明确的传达了出来。
命运的不公，如何身处底层的抗争，个中种种的无奈、挣扎、绝望。也体现的淋淋尽致。
不甘和不放弃这两个词不断轮回展现。不虐，不刻意，很合理。
很值得推荐的一本伪"系统无敌"文。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714112402,"group_id":"6954300984491248654","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5FbK394z5K/P3TwEQ68nPI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5c54ba40a43344fbae9775a361ed1581~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707242&x-signature=T2cayfufYvjzzfM6ErQwV%2FjolpM%3D","user_id":"5515113537","user_name":"代号陆拾"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"5515113537","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1805166314,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6954300984491248654","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越到了未来的末世。
